items.claim: Cody Durden has a history of being finished by submission.
items.quote: remember, he did get submitted against Alan Nasimento.

items.claim: Alessandro Costa is a highly aggressive fighter.
Ryan Gandra leaves his chin exposed and hands down when throwing combinations.
items.quote: This dude ba ba ba head up in the air moving forward.

items.claim: Zachary Reese is a skilled jiu-jitsu practitioner.
items.quote: Zack Reese is low-key a pretty good jiu-jitsu player.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra possesses superior knockout power compared to Zachary Reese.
items.quote: The power is a no contest. It's clearly Ryan Gandra.
he looks pretty durable to me.

items.claim: Zachary Reese struggles to manage distance against aggressive pressure fighters.
items.quote: I'd say he'd struggle in range.

items.claim: Ryan Gandra's reckless forward pressure makes him vulnerable to being countered.
items.quote: you get somebody that's able to set some shots up and circle out and avoid the blitz potential that Gandra's reckless style gets them, you know, caught back with some bombs
